text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The real paper is titled "Decoupled Weight Decay Regularization" (not "Decoded"), authored by Ilya Loshchilov and Frank Hutter, published at ICLR 2019. The cited title "Decoded weight decay regularization" is a fabrication — the one-word difference ("Decoded" vs. "Decoupled") combined with the abbreviated author names ("L. Ilya, H. Frank" instead of "Ilya Loshchilov, Frank Hutter") indicates a hallucinated reference grafted onto a real paper.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/1711.05101
